commit_scope: Move the BML/Hati native compiler floor from named class dispatch to default class-instance records, arity-aware class method dispatch, and template/generic metadata carriage.

commands: coord claim bml-hati-class-template-overload "walk remaining BML/Hati native compiler floor: class construction defaults, arity-aware overload dispatch, and template/generic metadata proof; keep full specialization and broad runtime construction for follow-on slices"

local_validation.notes: Focused Hati-native class/template/overload proof returns 23 across Go/Rust/TypeScript and binary artifact mode. Floor proof returns 24. Generic grammar proof remains 16777215. Prior class dispatch proof remains 17. Full Form validation returns fourth arm: 138 band(s) four-way, 559 ok, and 0 divergent. The new BML/Hati proof itself is 3-kernel only because fourth-arm mutable record admission for this proof family is still a named gap.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this compiler-floor slice. Public proof waits for merge/deploy when the compiler surface is promoted.

phase_gate.reason: Local compiler and metal-plane proof passed; CI, PR review, and merge remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A BML class AST can construct a default record-backed self carrying bmlClass plus declared fields, dispatch overloaded class methods by name plus arity from the compiled Hati image, and carry template/generic metadata without claiming full specialization.
test_flows: Parse source methods Read, Pick(), and Pick(int x) through the original BML source compiler.
Compile a class image with two fields and three methods through bml-hati-compile-image.
Run Read, Pick arity 0, and Pick arity 1 through bml-hati-run-class-method-with-arg-arity.
Verify Pick arity 2 returns BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED method/arity-not-found.
Verify template metadata carries kind class, two parameters, supported status, and body class name Rule.
